description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Selected: Chi Daily (TCM Wellness Coach). Score 8.2/10. TikTok Chinese Baddie trend + zero consumer TCM apps + Foundation Models on-device AI. Target: US + Japan. $4.99/month.

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
monetization section specifies subscription prices (monthly + annual)
curl itunes.apple.com/search for APP_NAME returns 0 exact name matches
userStories.notes: product-plan.md created. Chi Daily: $4.99/month / $34.99/year. 0 exact App Store matches. All sections with external sources (TikTok Report, Sensor Tower, RevenueCat, Apple Foundation Models).

userStories.title: Market research
userStories.notes: 6 competitors analyzed (Kanpobliss, TCM Diagnostics, TCM Clinic Aid, Calm, Headspace, Insight Timer). TAM: $13.09B global wellness apps. SAM: ~$680M (US+Japan TCM wellness). SOM: $10K–50K MRR Year 1. Zero direct consumer TCM AI daily wellness app in market.

userStories.title: Spec generation
acceptanceCriteria: docs/PRD.md exists and contains app_name, bundle_id, subscription prices
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md exists and references RevenueCat SDK (not Mock)
userStories.notes: 7 docs generated: PRD.md (app_name=Chi Daily, bundle_id=com.aniccafactory.chidaily, prices=$4.99/month + $34.99/year), ARCHITECTURE.md, UX_SPEC.md, DESIGN_SYSTEM.md, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md (real RevenueCat SDK, 0 Mocks), TEST_SPEC.md, RELEASE_SPEC.md.

userStories.title: Privacy Policy + ASC app creation
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
App created in ASC (APP_ID recorded in .env)
userStories.notes: privacy-policy.md + terms.md generated (offline app, no tracking). PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy with NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults CA92.1. Info.plist with ITSAppUsesNonExemptEncryption=false. Bundle ID com.aniccafactory.chidaily registered (6U7Q4SRJ4G). App created in ASC: APP_ID=6759994539.

userStories.title: IAP + pricing + RevenueCat setup
acceptanceCriteria: asc subscriptions groups list --app $APP_ID returns 1+ groups
asc subscriptions list --group $GROUP_ID returns monthly + annual products
asc subscriptions prices list --id $MONTHLY_ID returns 175 prices
SPM dependency on RevenueCat + RevenueCatUI added
userStories.notes: RC proj031e163b. App app5cd0cff05c. Entitlement entl0ed87666b2 (premium). Products: prodac73a59b45 (monthly) + prod0ce6efbeb1 (annual). Offering ofrng73bf7c9da7 (default) with 2 packages ($rc_monthly + $rc_annual). SPM RevenueCat 5.x added to ChiDaily.xcodeproj. ASC: GROUP_ID=21959961, 175 prices on both subs. Evidence: RC API shows 2 products + 1 offering + 2 packages. xcodeproj has XCRemoteSwiftPackageReference purchases-ios.

userStories.title: iOS implementation with real RevenueCat SDK
acceptanceCriteria: <AppName>ios/ directory exists with App/, Views/, Models/, Services/, Resources/
PaywallView uses RevenueCatUI (not custom mock paywall)
userStories.notes: ChiDailyios/ChiDaily/{App,Views,Models,Services,Resources} all exist. xcodebuild BUILD SUCCEEDED. Mock count=0. import RevenueCat=4. import RevenueCatUI=0. Custom SwiftUI PaywallView with Purchases.shared.purchase(package:) + Maybe Later skip (paywall_skip accessibility ID). GREENLIT CRITICAL=0. 19 Swift source files, 3 test files. Full EN+JA localization.

userStories.title: Testing
acceptanceCriteria: Unit tests exist for Models and Services
userStories.notes: xcodebuild test BUILD SUCCEEDED. 19 tests in 3 suites all PASSED. ConstitutionTypeTests (8), FoundationModelsServiceTests (4), CheckInViewModelTests (7). Products.storekit created (monthly $4.99 + annual $34.99, 7-day trial). Maestro flows: flows/paywall-purchase.yaml + flows/onboarding.yaml.

userStories.title: App Store preparation (screenshots + metadata + build + preflight)
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots generated via Pencil MCP (screenshot-creator skill)
Screenshots uploaded to ASC for en-US and ja
Metadata synced to ASC via asc-metadata-sync (en-US + ja)
Pricing set using subscription price-point IDs

userStories.title: App Store submission (App Privacy + submit)
acceptanceCriteria: Slack #metrics notified: need App Privacy setup
.app-privacy-done file exists (human created after ASC Web setup)
